ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the exchange */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this data belongs to */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the market data is from */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading platform */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trading platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for integrating with the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading platform (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trading platform details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the account */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading platform the account belongs to */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number of the trading account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trading account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_accounts_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES trading_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account this trade belongs to */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "buy_sell" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order (if available) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, custom) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
